---
title: "Dashing through the snow ❄️"
author: Jordan Alfano
format: dashboard
---

```{r}
#   include: false 
library(tidyverse)
library(gapminder)
library(tidyverse)

spam = 99
```



```{r}
#| title: GDP and Life Expectancy

library(gapminder)
library(tidyverse)
ggplot(gapminder, 
       aes(x = gdpPercap, 
           y = lifeExp, 
           color = continent)) +
  geom_point()
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Spam per day"

list(
  icon = "trash",
  color = "primary",
  value = spam
)
```
